# Porter Goldberg Residential
# Chicago Real Estate Experts

> Samantha Porter and Lauren Goldberg are boutique Chicago real estate brokers at Jameson Sotheby's International Realty. They specialize in buying, selling, and building homes in Chicago's North Side neighborhoods including Lincoln Park, Lakeview, Bucktown, and Wicker Park.

## About
- Team: Samantha Porter & Lauren Goldberg
- Brokerage: Jameson Sotheby's International Realty
- Location: 425 W. North Avenue, Chicago, IL 60610
- Specialty: Residential real estate in Chicago's North Side
- Experience: 25+ combined years in residential brokerage

## Services
- Buying: Full-service buyer representation for residential properties
- Selling: Comprehensive marketing, staging, and property preparation
- New Construction: Exclusive representatives for Halcyon Development
- Client Resources: Trusted vendor network and local school guidance

## Halcyon Development Partnership
Porter Goldberg Residential serves as the exclusive representatives for Halcyon Development, one of Chicago's most respected and visionary builders specializing in new construction homes.

- Website: https://www.portergoldberg.com

- Phone: 312-944-8900
- Email: lauren@portergoldberg.com
- Phone: 773-576-0053
